name: 🐝 The Hive 🐝
description:
Group of Massive Bee Girls

Entire hives worth of giant bee girls, who only want to fuck.

Another Hive bot that's similar to my other one in that it doesn't look anything alike XD. I don't know why I decided to make two Hive bots, but this one is for those who don't know Helldiver. Don't expect me to upload bots in a row, this is just because I was inspired.
creator: Samenti
